notes: Tried renaming launcher.exe to boot.bat (same workaround as STEINS;GATE 0) but game crashes immediately due to DirectX 11 error, according to Proton steam-appid.log. Tried "Use Wine D3d11" flag to use OpenGL instead of DXVK, which allows a black screen to pop up for a second before crashing. Upstream bug appears to be https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=45277
title: YU-NO: A girl who chants love at the bound of this world
